function: () => { const hero = document.querySelector('.hero'); const heroContent = document.querySelector('.hero-content'); const h1 = document.querySelector('h1'); const body = document.body; const dot = document.querySelector('[data-cursor-dot]'); return { body: { z: getComputedStyle(body).zIndex, pos: getComputedStyle(body).position, transform: getComputedStyle(body).transform }, hero: { tag: hero.tagName, z: getComputedStyle(hero).zIndex, pos: getComputedStyle(hero).position, transform: getComputedStyle(hero).transform, isolation: getComputedStyle(hero).isolation }, heroContent: { z: getComputedStyle(heroContent).zIndex, pos: getComputedStyle(heroContent).position }, h1: { z: getComputedStyle(h1).zIndex, pos: getComputedStyle(h1).position, transform: getComputedStyle(h1).transform }, dot: { z: getComputedStyle(dot).zIndex, pos: getComputedStyle(dot).position, transform: dot.style.transform } }; }
